name: how-to-win-friends
description: Dale Carnegie's How to Win Friends and Influence People — build relationships, handle people, lead without resistance using 30 principles
useCase: Developers and AI agents can use this skill to get practical advice on making friends, handling difficult people, winning arguments, giving criticism, and leading without authority.
knownRisks: Carnegie's principles are for genuine human connection, not manipulation — use sincerely
Cultural differences may affect how directly applicable some principles are
